channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Jeffries alleges 'voter suppression' after Black lawmaker retires in wake of Supreme Court ruling
item.description: Democratic House leader Hakeem Jeffries is alleging "voter suppression" after the retirement from Congress of a Louisiana Democrat whose predominantly...

item.title: Netanyahu to travel to Washington for Trump meeting, Lindsey Graham funeral
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu plans to visit Washington on Tuesday for a meeting with President Trump and to attend the funeral service fo...

item.title: The Fog of Hype
item.description: Clearing away the conservative obsession with Christopher Nolan.

item.title: Michigan City Council Member With Violent Past Charged With Election Fraud
item.description: Leon El-Alamin, a community activist and face of Gov. Gretchen Whitmer's social justice program, is accused of lying on his candidacy form.
